differential_diagnoses: Severe viral hepatitis (HAV, HEV, or EBV)
next_steps: Perform peripheral blood smear to evaluate for intraerythrocytic parasites and schistocytes
Send serum and urine PCR for Leptospira species
Order serologic testing for HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV, and EBV
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage to assess for diffuse alveolar hemorrhage and send samples for broad-spectrum pathogen PCR
Assess urinalysis (specifically for bilirubinuria, protein, and blood)
Obtain full hepatic enzyme profile (AST, ALT, ALP, GGT) and coagulation studies (PT/INR, PTT)
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics with close hemodynamic monitoring
